summary: Completed frontend-only testing of landing page reorganization for Addrika Fragrances. All 9 features verified successfully - category grid with 4 cards, Coming Soon overlays, Best Seller badge, scroll functionality, and hero section updates.

1_category_grid_display.details: 4-card grid displays correctly: Premium Incense Sticks, Dhoop Collection, Bakhoor & Oud, Home Care

2_section_heading.details: Section heading 'Addrika Fragrances' displays correctly with data-testid='category-section-title'

3_best_seller_badge.details: Premium Incense Sticks card has 'Best Seller' badge with gold color and 'Explore Collection' link

4_coming_soon_badges_overlays.details: Dhoop, Bakhoor, and Home Care cards all have 'Coming Soon' badges and overlay indicators with proper data-testid attributes

5_incense_card_scroll.details: Clicking Premium Incense Sticks card scrolls to fragrances section (id='fragrances')

6_coming_soon_not_clickable.details: All Coming Soon cards have cursor:auto (not pointer) and do not trigger scroll on click

7_hero_section_text.details: Hero section displays generic text about all product categories with 'ADDRIKA' heading and 'Elegance in Every Scent' tagline

8_hero_badges.details: Hero badges show 'Premium Incense', 'Dhoop & Bakhoor', 'Home Care'

9_explore_collections_button.details: Explore Collections button in hero scrolls to category grid section

seed_data_creation: None - used existing productCategories from mockData.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page reorganization complete. Category grid has 4 cards - only incense-sticks is active with scrollTarget='fragrances'. Other 3 categories (dhoop, bakhoor, home-care) have active:false with Coming Soon overlays and non-clickable cursor. All data-testid attributes are in place for automated testing.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - This was feature verification, not bug fixing
